title: Add connected?/1 guard around a PubSub subscribe
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/live/feed_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.FeedLive) that subscribes to "feed:user:1" via Phoenix.PubSub.subscribe/2 only when connected?(socket) is true. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :items, [])}. Add a handle_info/2 that prepends new items on {:new_item, item}. Render
  • {i.text}
    • .
tier_rationale: Single Iron Law application: guard a subscribe with connected?/1. Canonical placement.
research_citation: oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix iron law: 'Check connected?/1 before PubSub subscribe'
